mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_AUTH_HISTORY (USER_NM, PHONE_NUM, AUTH_CODE, TX_ID, AUTH_STATUS) VALUES (#{USER_NM}, #{PHONE_NUM}, #{AUTH_CODE}, #{TX_ID}, #{AUTH_STATUS})
mapper.select: SELECT AUTH_SEQ, USER_NM, PHONE_NUM, AUTH_CODE, TX_ID, AUTH_STATUS FROM TB_AUTH_HISTORY WHERE AUTH_SEQ = #{AUTH_SEQ}
SELECT AUTH_SEQ, USER_NM, PHONE_NUM, AUTH_CODE, TX_ID, AUTH_STATUS FROM TB_AUTH_HISTORY WHERE USER_NM = #{USER_NM} AND PHONE_NUM = #{PHONE_NUM} AND AUTH_STATUS = '1' ORDER BY AUTH_SEQ DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_USER_INFO (USER_NM, PHONE_NUM, USER_CI, USER_DI, BIRTH_DATE, GENDER) VALUES (#{USER_NM}, #{PHONE_NUM}, #{USER_CI}, #{USER_DI}, #{BIRTH_DATE}, #{GENDER})
INSERT INTO TB_USER_ACCOUNT (USER_SEQ, LOGIN_ID, LOGIN_PW) VALUES (#{USER_SEQ}, #{LOGIN_ID}, #{LOGIN_PW})
INSERT INTO TB_USER_TERMS_AGREE (USER_SEQ, SERVICE_TERMS_YN, PRIVACY_POLICY_YN, MARKETING_RECV_YN) VALUES (#{USER_SEQ}, #{SERVICE_TERMS_YN}, #{PRIVACY_POLICY_YN}, #{MARKETING_RECV_YN})
INSERT INTO TB_SET_VACATION_MGMT (USER_SEQ, BASE_YEAR, TOTAL_DAYS, USED_DAYS, REMAIN_DAYS) VALUES (#{USER_SEQ}, #{BASE_YEAR}, #{TOTAL_DAYS}, #{USED_DAYS}, #{REMAIN_DAYS})

INSERT INTO TB_SET_DUTY_TYPE (USER_SEQ, DUTY_NM, START_TIME, END_TIME, COLOR_CODE, DUTY_CATEGORY, OFF_DEDUCT_YN, USE_YN) VALUES
(#{row.USER_SEQ}, #{row.DUTY_NM}, #{row.START_TIME}, #{row.END_TIME}, #{row.COLOR_CODE}, #{row.DUTY_CATEGORY}, #{row.OFF_DEDUCT_YN}, #{row.USE_YN})
